calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-23-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an adult and four minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Abdulrahman Aljuheim was present in pro per on behalf of himself, and as Guardian ad Litem for the minors Wadie A. Aljheim, Bakil A. Aljuheim, Hashed A. Aljuheim and Osan A. Aljuheim.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Kewakib K Algomaeh, the minors' mother, was placed under oath and examined.
Abraham Abdullah was placed under oath and served as Arabic speaking interpreter for petitioner and mother.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to Abdul Fatah K Algaheim.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to Wadie Abdul Fatah K Algaheim, Bakil Abdul Fatah K Algaheim, Hashed Abdul Fatah K Algaheim and Osan Abdul Fatah K Alagheim.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
